title: Find out if you need a work permit - Canada.ca
content:
## Find out what type of work permit you need
Get the right instructions to apply.
Answer a few questions to find out:
- if you need a work permit or if you’re exempt
- if you need an open or employer-specific work permit
- if you need special instructions to apply
Find out what type of work permit you
          need

## Types of work permits
There are 2 types of work permits. The type you can apply for depends
    on
    your eligibility.

### Employer-specific work permit
- You need a job offer.
- Your employer may need a labour market impact assessment
          (LMIA).
For special
          circumstances
- You don’t need a job offer.
- You can work for most compliant employers in Canada.
- You’re only eligible in certain situations.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
